SILKSONGRELICS-BURN_POWER.description: At the start of turn, lose HP equal to the stack count, and at the end of turn, increase the stack count by [blue]1[/blue].
SILKSONGRELICS-BURN_POWER.smartDescripti: At the start of turn, lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, and at the end of turn, increase the stack count by [blue]1[/blue].
SILKSONGRELICS-BURN_POWER.title: Ignite
SILKSONGRELICS-SNARE_SETTER_POWER.descri: On the next [blue]1[/blue] time(s) you are attacked, deal [blue]25[/blue] damage to all enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-SNARE_SETTER_POWER.smartD: On the next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s) you are attacked, deal [blue]25[/blue] damage to all enemies.
SILKSONGRELICS-SNARE_SETTER_POWER.title: Trap
SILKSONGRELICS-FLINTSLATE_POWER.descript: Damage dealt this turn is increased by [blue]50%[/blue]. Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, apply [blue]3[/blue] stacks of [gold]Ignite[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-FLINTSLATE_POWER.smartDes: Damage dealt this turn is increased by [blue]50%[/blue]. Whenever you deal damage to an enemy, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] stacks of [gold]Ignite[/gold].
SILKSONGRELICS-FLINTSLATE_POWER.title: Flame Infusion
SILKSONGRELICS-COGFLY_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]3[/blue] damage at random.
SILKSONGRELICS-COGFLY_POWER.smartDescrip: At the start of your turn, deal [blue]3[/blue] damage [blue]{Amount}[/blue] time(s) at random.
